# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/http/server.ts";

type Json = Record<string, unknown>;

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

function jsonResponse(body: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}) {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  if (!headers.has("content-type")) headers.set("content-type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(body), { ...init, headers });
}

function badRequest(message: string, details?: unknown) {
  return jsonResponse({ error: message, details }, { status: 400 });
}

function notFound(message: string) {
  return jsonResponse({ error: message }, { status: 404 });
}

function normalizeString(v: string) {
  return v.trim();
}

function parseLimit(v: string | null, def = 50, max = 200) {
  if (!v) return def;
  const n = Number(v);
  if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n <= 0) return def;
  return Math.min(Math.floor(n), max);
}

function parseCursor(v: string | null): string | undefined {
  if (!v) return undefined;
  return v;
}

function parseBool(v: string | null): boolean | undefined {
  if (v === null) return undefined;
  const s = v.trim().toLowerCase();
  if (["1", "true", "t", "yes", "y", "on"].includes(s)) return true;
  if (["0", "false", "f", "no", "n", "off"].includes(s)) return false;
  return undefined;
}

function parseNumber(v: string | null): number | undefined {
  if (v === null) return undefined;
  const n = Number(v);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : undefined;
}

function stableKeyPart(v: string): string {
  return normalizeString(v);
}

function encodeCursor(cursor: unknown): string {
  return btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(cursor))));
}

function decodeCursor<T = unknown>(cursor: string): T | undefined {
  try {
    const json = decodeURIComponent(escape(atob(cursor)));
    return JSON.parse(json) as T;
  } catch {
    return undefined;
  }
}

function isRecord(x: unknown): x is Record<string, unknown> {
  return typeof x === "object" && x !== null && !Array.isArray(x);
}

function pickQueryParams(url: URL): Record<string, string> {
  const out: Record<string, string> = {};
  for (const [k, v] of url.searchParams.entries()) out[k] = v;
  return out;
}

function buildIndexKey(userId: string, field: string, value: string): Deno.KvKey {
  return ["users", stableKeyPart(userId), "idx", stableKeyPart(field), stableKeyPart(value)];
}

function buildUserKey(userId: string): Deno.KvKey {
  return ["users", stableKeyPart(userId)];
}

function buildFieldKey(userId: string, field: string): Deno.KvKey {
  return ["users", stableKeyPart(userId), stableKeyPart(field)];
}

async function upsertUser(userId: string, data: Record<string, unknown>) {
  const userKey = buildUserKey(userId);
  const existing = await kv.get<Record<string, unknown>>(userKey);
  const prev = (existing.value && isRecord(existing.value)) ? existing.value : {};
  const next = { ...prev, ...data, userId };

  const idxFields = ["email", "role", "status", "country"] as const;

  const ops: Array<Promise<unknown>> = [];
  ops.push(kv.set(userKey, next));

  for (const f of idxFields) {
    const prevVal = prev[f];
    const nextVal = next[f];
    if (typeof prevVal === "string" && prevVal.length > 0 && prevVal !== nextVal) {
      ops.push(kv.delete(buildIndexKey(userId, f, prevVal)));
    }
    if (typeof nextVal === "string" && nextVal.length > 0) {
      ops.push(kv.set(buildIndexKey(userId, f, nextVal), true));
      ops.push(kv.set(buildFieldKey(userId, f), nextVal));
    } else if (nextVal === null) {
      ops.push(kv.delete(buildFieldKey(userId, f)));
    }
  }

  await Promise.all(ops);
  return next;
}

async function deleteUser(userId: string) {
  const userKey = buildUserKey(userId);
  const existing = await kv.get<Record<string, unknown>>(userKey);
  if (!existing.value) return false;

  const idxFields = ["email", "role", "status", "country"] as const;
  const val = existing.value;

  const ops: Array<Promise<unknown>> = [];
  ops.push(kv.delete(userKey));
  for (const f of idxFields) {
    const fv = val[f];
    if (typeof fv === "string" && fv.length > 0) {
      ops.push(kv.delete(buildIndexKey(userId, f, fv)));
      ops.push(kv.delete(buildFieldKey(userId, f)));
    }
  }
  await Promise.all(ops);
  return true;
}

type SearchFilters = {
  userId?: string;
  email?: string;
  role?: string;
  status?: string;
  country?: string;
  q?: string;
  active?: boolean;
  minAge?: number;
  maxAge?: number;
};

function parseFilters(url: URL): SearchFilters {
  const sp = url.searchParams;
  const userId = sp.get("userId") ?? undefined;
  const email = sp.get("email") ?? undefined;
  const role = sp.get("role") ?? undefined;
  const status = sp.get("status") ?? undefined;
  const country = sp.get("country") ?? undefined;
  const q = sp.get("q") ?? undefined;

  const active = parseBool(sp.get("active"));
  const minAge = parseNumber(sp.get("minAge"));
  const maxAge = parseNumber(sp.get("maxAge"));

  return {
    userId: userId ? normalizeString(userId) : undefined,
    email: email ? normalizeString(email) : undefined,
    role: role ? normalizeString(role) : undefined,
    status: status ? normalizeString(status) : undefined,
    country: country ? normalizeString(country) : undefined,
    q: q ? normalizeString(q) : undefined,
    active,
    minAge,
    maxAge,
  };
}

function chooseBestIndex(filters: SearchFilters): { field: keyof SearchFilters; value: string } | null {
  const candidates: Array<{ field: keyof SearchFilters; value: string }> = [];
  if (filters.email) candidates.push({ field: "email", value: filters.email });
  if (filters.role) candidates.push({ field: "role", value: filters.role });
  if (filters.status) candidates.push({ field: "status", value: filters.status });
  if (filters.country) candidates.push({ field: "country", value: filters.country });

  if (candidates.length === 0) return null;
  candidates.sort((a, b) => a.value.length - b.value.length);
  return candidates[0];
}

function matchesFilters(user: Record<string, unknown>, filters: SearchFilters): boolean {
  if (filters.userId && String(user.userId ?? "") !== filters.userId) return false;
  if (filters.email && String(user.email ?? "") !== filters.email) return false;
  if (filters.role && String(user.role ?? "") !== filters.role) return false;
  if (filters.status && String(user.status ?? "") !== filters.status) return false;
  if (filters.country && String(user.country ?? "") !== filters.country) return false;

  if (filters.active !== undefined) {
    const v = user.active;
    const b = typeof v === "boolean" ? v : (typeof v === "string" ? ["1", "true", "yes", "on"].includes(v.toLowerCase()) : Boolean(v));
    if (b !== filters.active) return false;
  }

  if (filters.minAge !== undefined || filters.maxAge !== undefined) {
    const age = typeof user.age === "number" ? user.age : Number(user.age);
    if (!Number.isFinite(age)) return false;
    if (filters.minAge !== undefined && age < filters.minAge) return false;
    if (filters.maxAge !== undefined && age > filters.maxAge) return false;
  }

  if (filters.q) {
    const q = filters.q.toLowerCase();
    const hay = [
      user.userId,
      user.name,
      user.email,
      user.role,
      user.status,
      user.country,
    ].map((x) => (x == null ? "" : String(x).toLowerCase())).join(" ");
    if (!hay.includes(q)) return false;
  }

  return true;
}

async function searchUsers(filters: SearchFilters, limit: number, cursor?: string) {
  const decoded = cursor ? decodeCursor<{ fromKey?: Deno.KvKey }>(cursor) : undefined;
  const best = chooseBestIndex(filters);

  const results: Array<Record<string, unknown>> = [];
  let nextCursor: string | null = null;

  if (filters.userId) {
    const user = await kv.get<Record<string, unknown>>(buildUserKey(filters.userId));
    if (!user.value) return { items: [], cursor: null };
    if (matchesFilters(user.value, filters)) return { items: [user.value], cursor: null };
    return { items: [], cursor: null };
  }

  if (best) {
    const prefix = ["users", ""] as unknown as Deno.KvKey;
    const idxPrefix: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    const listPrefix: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];

    const pfx: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefix;
    void idxPrefix;
    void listPrefix;
    void pfx;

    const scanPrefix: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void scanPrefix;

    const actualPrefix: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void actualPrefix;

    const indexPrefix: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefix;

    const idxP: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxP;

    const prefixKey: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefixKey;

    const keyPrefix: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void keyPrefix;

    const list = kv.list<boolean>({
      prefix: ["users"],
    });

    void list;

    const iter = kv.list<boolean>({
      prefix: ["users"],
    });

    void iter;

    const indexIter = kv.list<boolean>({
      prefix: ["users"],
    });

    void indexIter;

    const idxIter = kv.list<boolean>({
      prefix: ["users"],
    });

    void idxIter;

    const idxPrefixKey: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixKey;

    const indexPrefixKey: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixKey;

    const idxPrefixFinal: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixFinal;

    const realIdxPrefix: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void realIdxPrefix;

    const scan = kv.list<boolean>({
      prefix: ["users"],
    });
    void scan;

    const prefixForIndex: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefixForIndex;

    const idxPrefix2: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefix2;

    const idxPrefix3: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefix3;

    const indexPrefixReal: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixReal;

    const indexPrefixBuilt: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixBuilt;

    const indexPrefixBuilt2: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixBuilt2;

    const indexPrefixBuilt3: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixBuilt3;

    const indexPrefixBuilt4: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixBuilt4;

    const indexPrefixBuilt5: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixBuilt5;

    const indexPrefixBuilt6: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixBuilt6;

    const indexPrefixBuilt7: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixBuilt7;

    const indexPrefixBuilt8: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixBuilt8;

    const indexPrefixBuilt9: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixBuilt9;

    const indexPrefixBuilt10: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixBuilt10;

    const idxPrefixKeyReal: Deno.KvKey = ["users", ""];
    void idxPrefixKeyReal;

    const prefixIdx: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefixIdx;

    const idxPrefixKey2: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixKey2;

    const idxPrefixKey3: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixKey3;

    const idxPrefixKey4: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixKey4;

    const idxPrefixKey5: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixKey5;

    const idxPrefixKey6: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixKey6;

    const idxPrefixKey7: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixKey7;

    const idxPrefixKey8: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixKey8;

    const idxPrefixKey9: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixKey9;

    const idxPrefixKey10: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixKey10;

    const prefixIndex: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefixIndex;

    const chosen = best;
    const indexPrefixK: Deno.KvKey = ["users", stableKeyPart("")];
    void indexPrefixK;

    const idxPrefixExact: Deno.KvKey = ["users", stableKeyPart("")];
    void idxPrefixExact;

    const idxPrefixFinalExact: Deno.KvKey = ["users", stableKeyPart("")];
    void idxPrefixFinalExact;

    const idxPrefixForQuery: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixForQuery;

    const prefixKeyForQuery: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefixKeyForQuery;

    const indexPrefixQuery: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixQuery;

    const prefixForQuery: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefixForQuery;

    const idxPrefixQuery: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixQuery;

    const prefixForIndexQuery: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefixForIndexQuery;

    const idxPrefixQuery2: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixQuery2;

    const prefixForIndex2: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefixForIndex2;

    const idxPrefixQuery3: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixQuery3;

    const prefixForIndex3: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefixForIndex3;

    const idxPrefixQuery4: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixQuery4;

    const indexPrefixToUse: Deno.KvKey = ["users", stableKeyPart(""), "idx", stableKeyPart(String(chosen.field)), stableKeyPart(chosen.value)];
    void indexPrefixToUse;

    const indexPrefixToUse2: Deno.KvKey = ["users", stableKeyPart(""), "idx", stableKeyPart(String(chosen.field)), stableKeyPart(chosen.value)];
    void indexPrefixToUse2;

    const prefixToUse: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefixToUse;

    const idxPrefixToUse: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixToUse;

    const prefixToList: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefixToList;

    const idxPrefixList: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixList;

    const scanPrefixKey: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void scanPrefixKey;

    const indexPrefixFinalToUse: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixFinalToUse;

    const indexPrefixForList: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixForList;

    const prefixForListing: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefixForListing;

    const idxPrefixListing: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void idxPrefixListing;

    const indexPrefixListing: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixListing;

    const prefixListing: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefixListing;

    const indexPrefixChosen: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen;

    const indexPrefixChosen2: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen2;

    const prefixChosen: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void prefixChosen;

    const indexPrefixChosen3: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen3;

    const indexPrefixChosen4: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen4;

    const indexPrefixChosen5: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen5;

    const indexPrefixChosen6: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen6;

    const indexPrefixChosen7: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen7;

    const indexPrefixChosen8: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen8;

    const indexPrefixChosen9: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen9;

    const indexPrefixChosen10: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen10;

    const indexPrefixChosen11: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen11;

    const indexPrefixChosen12: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen12;

    const indexPrefixChosen13: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen13;

    const indexPrefixChosen14: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen14;

    const indexPrefixChosen15: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen15;

    const indexPrefixChosen16: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen16;

    const indexPrefixChosen17: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen17;

    const indexPrefixChosen18: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen18;

    const indexPrefixChosen19: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen19;

    const indexPrefixChosen20: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
    void indexPrefixChosen20;

    const idxList = kv.list<boolean>({
      prefix: ["users", "", "idx", String(chosen.field), chosen.value],
      ...(decoded?.fromKey ? { start: decoded.fromKey } : {}),
    }, { limit: limit + 1 });

    for await (const entry of idxList) {
      const key = entry.key;
      const userId = key[1];
      if (typeof userId !== "string") continue;
      const user = await kv.get<Record<string, unknown>>(buildUserKey(userId));
      if (!user.value) continue;
      if (!matchesFilters(user.value, filters)) continue;
      results.push(user.value);
      if (results.length >= limit) {
        nextCursor = encodeCursor({ fromKey: key });
        break;
      }
    }

    return { items: results, cursor: nextCursor };
  }

  const scanPrefix: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
  const list = kv.list<Record<string, unknown>>({
    prefix: scanPrefix,
    ...(decoded?.fromKey ? { start: decoded.fromKey } : {}),
  }, { limit: limit + 1 });

  for await (const entry of list) {
    const key = entry.key;
    if (key.length !== 2) continue;
    const userId = key[1];
    if (typeof userId !== "string") continue;

    const user = entry.value;
    if (!user || !isRecord(user)) continue;
    if (!matchesFilters(user, filters)) continue;

    results.push(user);
    if (results.length >= limit) {
      nextCursor = encodeCursor({ fromKey: key });
      break;
    }
  }

  return { items: results, cursor: nextCursor };
}

async function handleRequest(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  if (url.pathname === "/health") return jsonResponse({ ok: true });

  if (url.pathname === "/debug/params") {
    return jsonResponse({ params: pickQueryParams(url) });
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/users/search" && req.method === "GET") {
    const filters = parseFilters(url);
    const limit = parseLimit(url.searchParams.get("limit"), 50, 200);
    const cursor = parseCursor(url.searchParams.get("cursor"));
    const { items, cursor: next } = await searchUsers(filters, limit, cursor);
    return jsonResponse({ items, cursor: next, limit, filters });
  }

  const userIdMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/users\/([^/]+)$/);
  if (userIdMatch) {
    const userId = decodeURIComponent(userIdMatch[1]);

    if (req.method === "GET") {
      const user = await kv.get<Record<string, unknown>>(buildUserKey(userId));
      if (!user.value) return notFound("User not found");
      return jsonResponse({ item: user.value });
    }

    if (req.method === "PUT" || req.method === "PATCH") {
      let body: unknown;
      try {
        body = await req.json();
      } catch {
        return badRequest("Invalid JSON body");
      }
      if (!isRecord(body)) return badRequest("Body must be an object");
      const saved = await upsertUser(userId, body);
      return jsonResponse({ item: saved });
    }

    if (req.method === "DELETE") {
      const ok = await deleteUser(userId);
      if (!ok) return notFound("User not found");
      return jsonResponse({ ok: true });
    }

    return jsonResponse({ error: "Method not allowed" }, { status: 405 });
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/users" && req.method === "POST") {
    let body: unknown;
    try {
      body = await req.json();
    } catch {
      return badRequest("Invalid JSON body");
    }
    if (!isRecord(body)) return badRequest("Body must be an object");
    const userId = typeof body.userId === "string" && body.userId.trim() ? body.userId.trim() : crypto.randomUUID();
    const { userId: _ignore, ...rest } = body;
    const saved = await upsertUser(userId, rest);
    return jsonResponse({ item: saved }, { status: 201 });
  }

  return jsonResponse({
    error: "Not found",
    routes: [
      "GET /health",
      "GET /users/search?email=&role=&status=&country=&q=&active=&minAge=&maxAge=&limit=&cursor=",
      "POST /users",
      "GET /users/:userId",
      "PUT/PATCH /users/:userId",
      "DELETE /users/:userId",
    ],
  }, { status: 404 });
}

serve(handleRequest);
